name: Tuna Salad (Zlatkin)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the tuna and flaked tuna with chopped green onion.
2. Add the chopped celery, pimiento-stuffed olives, chopped green bell pepper, salt, and black pepper to the bowl.
3. Stir in the mayonnaise and lemon juice until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
Makes six servings.
